overall.description: First-person exploration through a rainy cyberpunk cityscape at night. The player traverses elevated walkways and overpasses overlooking busy streets, with prominent pink neon signage and palm trees lining the route. Heavy rain and haze create atmospheric reflections on wet surfaces in this high-quality game engine footage.

events.description: passing a burning barrel with scattered debris and trash

agents.ego_description: walking along covered coastal walkway, approaching and ascending stairs past a burning barrel

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the coastal walkway
dark ocean visible beyond the railing

staircase leading upward to upper level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night along a covered coastal walkway lined with palm trees. The player moves forward past a burning barrel that casts flickering orange light on the wet concrete, then begins ascending a staircase toward an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper platform with city view approaching TENGU entrance

events.description: reaching top of first stairs, cityscape and TENGU neon sign become visible
ascending second set of stairs toward TENGU entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing second stair section toward the TENGU building with prominent pink neon signage

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TENGU' text
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: After reaching the top of the first stair section, the cityscape opens up revealing the prominent pink TENGU neon sign in the distance. The player continues ascending a second flight of stairs, passing glass railings with the urban skyline visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overpass overlooking busy multi-lane street

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering open overpass with glass railings
observing heavy traffic flow with headlights on wet street below

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated overpass, looking down at busy street traffic through glass railings

entered.detail: transparent safety barriers along the overpass edge
dense vehicle traffic with headlights reflecting on wet road surface
elevated pedestrian bridge with concrete flooring

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an open overpass with glass railings overlooking a busy street filled with traffic. The camera pans to observe the flow of vehicles below, their headlights cutting through the rain and haze, while the TENGU sign remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor leading to TENGU

events.description: entering covered corridor with metal fencing and artificial lighting
transition from neon-lit exterior to dim artificially lit interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through enclosed corridor toward the TENGU entrance, passing trash and debris

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with roof and metal fencing on sides
black metal railings lining the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the street view and enters a narrow covered corridor. The environment shifts from open and neon-lit to enclosed and artificially lit, with the TENGU sign visible as a bright beacon at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined elevated walkway approaching TENGU building

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open walkway with surrounding trees
heavy rain intensifies with visible water reflections on neon-lit surfaces

agents.ego_description: approaching the TENGU building through neon-lit walkways lined with trees, observing the surrounding city lights

entered.detail: deciduous trees lining the walkway with wet leaves
structures with colorful neon advertisements and signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the player enters an open walkway surrounded by trees and vibrant neon-lit structures. The TENGU sign looms large and close ahead, dominating the skyline as rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflective surfaces that mirror the pink and blue neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim coastal walkway toward a towering, neon-lit urban landmark. It begins on a rainy path lined with palm trees, moving past a flickering burning barrel before ascending a series of staircases that gradually reveal a sprawling cityscape. As the camera reaches the top, the view expands onto an open overpass where the pink TENGU neon sign emerges in the distance and traffic flows through the haze below. The scene then shifts from this open vista into a narrow, enclosed corridor that tunnels toward the city lights before finally opening back up into a vibrant walkway. Here, the TENGU sign looms large and dominant over the skyline, with heavy rain creating vivid pink and blue reflections across the wet surfaces.
